semantic.role: View producer that generates the agent briefing artifact by loading architectural rules, knowledge graph data, and diagnostic reports, then formatting the output as localized Markdown.
responsibilities: Load architectural rules from a directory via loadRulesFromDir to include in the briefing.
Ingest knowledge graph (KnowledgeGraph, KnowledgeGraphNode, KnowledgeGraphEdge) and diagnostic data (CycleReport, DeadCodeReport, HubReport) for analysis.
Compose a Markdown document with sections for entry points, language support, and rule summaries by escaping inline formatting.
Issue warnings through runtimeIO when data inconsistencies are encountered.
outOfScope: Direct LLM invocation or prompt construction.
Scanning source code files for AST extraction.
invariants: The produced artifact must conform to IViewArtifactEnvelope and ViewArtifact interfaces.
All user-facing text is Markdown-escaped to prevent injection or formatting corruption.
Requires a SpineConfig to determine supported locales and rule paths.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Generate a concise architecture briefing for AI agents by aggregating rules, dependency graphs, and diagnostic summaries into a single Markdown document.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor to remove legacy CLI aliases and rebuild documentation artifacts; this file was modified as part of aligning the view producer with the new schema and updated CLI commands.
